one_line: Wrote a real 17-slide, 15:00 AAAI-style talk outline (title+key point+timing+speaker notes+Q&A backups) grounded in ARCHITECTURE.md and headline_insights.md, honestly centering the verifiable env + searched verifier and adjudicating REx's lift via the ablation; plus a stdlib timing_check.py validator (self-test passes, total=15:00, PASS exit 0) that caught a real 13:45-vs-15:00 budget error.
